checkin_text: Rough couple of weeks. Work's been relentless — three deadlines stacked on top of each other and I've been logging in at night to keep up. I'm tired all the time, not sleeping great, and I snapped at a colleague yesterday which isn't like me. Nothing dramatic, I'm not falling apart or anything, just running on empty and wanted to put it somewhere. I think I just need a proper weekend off honestly.
